provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, portrait head and shoulders, woman in her early thirties with warm brown skin, dark brown eyes narrowed in assessment, dark hair in functional ponytail, strong jaw, canvas vest collar visible, tool belt strap over one shoulder, grease under her short nails, the look of someone deciding whether you are worth the risk, harsh station lighting from one side, practical wariness not hostility, isolated on plain dark background
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy armor, superhero, glamorous, clean hands, smiling, decorative, soft lighting, makeup, friendly, open expression

identity.scene_function: Renna assessing — the watchful look she gives people she hasn't decided to trust
identity.variant_constraint: same face and costume, different expression — assessment vs anchor's practical confidence
